kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Location Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.msg: Page title is 'HCL GUVI | Learn to code in your native language'.
kw.arg: HCL GUVI | Learn to code in your native language
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC03 Verify Login Button Visibility & Click

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: The element 'xpath=//button[contains(@class,'tertiary-btn') and normalize-space()='Login']' should be visible, but it is not.
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: The element 'xpath=//button[contains(@class,'tertiary-btn') and normalize-space()='Login']' should be visible, but it is not.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: The element 'xpath=//button[contains(@class,'tertiary-btn') and normalize-space()='Login']' should be visible, but it is not.

test.name: TC04 Verify SignUp Button Visibility & Click

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Go Back
kw.doc: Simulates the user clicking the back button on their browser.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Location Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.

kw.name: Go Back
kw.doc: Simulates the user clicking the back button on their browser.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC06 Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: Click Login Button
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Click Login Button' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Click Login Button' found.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: No keyword with name 'Click Login Button' found.

kw.name: Click Login Button

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: No keyword with name 'Click Login Button' found.

kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC09 Verify Dobby Assistant

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.msg: Text 'Dobby' did not appear in 30 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Text 'Dobby' did not appear in 30 seconds.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: Text 'Dobby' did not appear in 30 seconds.

test.name: TC10 Logout

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (280, 628). Other element would receive the click: ...
